component.name: Section Header
component.description: Section title row with optional leading icon, optional ADD/EDIT action, or stacked subtitle. Consolidated to three structural layouts; content (copy, icons, tones) is driven by instance overrides / code props—not separate Figma variants.

layoutSemantics.Row: Leading icon + title (accent/secondary tone) + optional trailing ADD/EDIT pill.
layoutSemantics.Stack: Leading icon + title row + subtitle row (status / helper copy). No trailing pill in the default Figma example.
layoutSemantics.Title only: Single title, no leading icon, no action—e.g. “This Week”.

codeProps.title: string
codeProps.subtitle: optional string; Stack layout
codeProps.action: none, add, or edit; Row layout only
codeProps.leading: optional React node; Row and Stack
codeProps.leadingDataName: section-header-leading-icon (default, e.g. SESSIONS row) or section-header-leading-icon2 (Figma **Icon Title** / NEEDS ATTENTION)
codeProps.titleTone: accent, secondary, warning, info, primary, or neutral (e.g. UNPAID)
codeProps.onActionClick: optional callback when action pill is pressed

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: Section Header (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)
figmaLayerNames.leadingIcon2: section-header-leading-icon2 — **Icon Title** / NEEDS ATTENTION alert slot (distinct name from +Button row in Figma `371:2179`)

notes: Previous one-off Figma variants (Variant9–14, etc.) were removed; use instances + overrides for section-specific copy and icons.

2026-03-28: Plugin pass bound remaining unbound solid fills inside this set to local color variables where RGBA matched a token; strokes were included—one component-set stroke color did not match any file color variable (review in Figma if it should become a token).
Text still uses assigned text styles; swap to variable-bound text styles in Figma if you add them later.

2026-04-08: `COMPONENT_SET` uses vertical auto layout (16px gap). Structural layers use `section-header-*` kebab-case (`section-header-heading`, `section-header-leading-icon`, `section-header-title`, `section-header-subtitle` / `section-header-subtitle-text`, `section-header-action` + `section-header-action-icon` / `section-header-action-label`). `clipsContent` cleared on heading/action/subtitle frames. Vector artwork left un-flattened in automation.

2026-04-11: Sync with Figma `371:2179` — content max width **393** (symbol width); `data-name` on heading, leading, title, subtitle, action; ADD **12px** + icon, EDIT **14px** pencil; action pill **24px** height; **Title only** centered; Stack subtitle `py` 1px to match Figma `py-px`.

2026-04-11: Figma update — **Icon Title** uses `section-header-leading-icon2` for the alert icon; **Icon Title + Button** keeps `section-header-leading-icon`; exposed as `leadingDataName`. Title tone **neutral** maps to **Semantic/Status/Neutral/Text** (UNPAID).
